title: Usopp’s Village Comes Into View
description: On pages 10–13, the Syrup Village story develops through Usopp, Kaya, Kuro, Jango, and the Straw Hats as the danger behind the village’s peaceful surface becomes clearer.
scene: This scene follows the tension around Usopp’s village: lies, loyalty, hidden plans, and the growing clash with the Black Cat Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Wow! There's really an island here!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: We followed the map, so it won't be wrong!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Uh huh! Looks like there's a small village!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Hey! Tamanegl, are those the pirates that you were talking about?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: That's right! Look, there's a pirate symbol!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: been a long time since I last stood on firm ground...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: That's because you were sleep- ing all the time!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I just noticed a moment ago...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What are those guys doing there?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I am the great pirate fleet leader, usopp, who is in charge of the security of this village!

summary: The part advances the Syrup Village arc by tying Usopp’s reputation and Kaya’s safety to the threat posed by Kuro and his crew.
